entry.title: New: GREAT-11(27) Reso 26-15 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
RESOLUTION 26-15, AUTHORIZING THE EMPLOYMENT OF MCCORRISTON MILLER MUKAI MACKINNON LLP, AS SPECIAL COUNSEL IN TODD P. LYNAM, ET AL. V. COUNTY OF MAUI, ET AL.; CIVIL 2CCV-25-0003780, AND IN ANY FUTURE LITIGATIONS CHALLENGING ORDINANCE 5909 (2025) (GREAT-11(27))

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
